9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Setup"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"1. Create App"}]
b:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"fly apps create mnemosyne-api\n","language":"bash"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"2. Create Volume"}]
d:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"fly volumes create mnemosyne_data --size 10 --region ord\n","language":"bash"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"3. fly.toml"}]
f:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"app = \"mnemosyne-api\"\nprimary_region = \"ord\"\n\n[build]\ndockerfile = \"Dockerfile\"\n\n[mounts]\nsource = \"mnemosyne_data\"\ndestination = \"/data\"\n\n[env]\nMNEMOSYNE_DB_PATH = \"/data/mnemosyne.db\"\nMNEMOSYNE_HOST = \"0.0.0.0\"\nMNEMOSYNE_PORT = \"8080\"\n\n[http_service]\ninternal_port = 8080\nforce_https = true\nauto_stop_machines = true\nauto_start_machines = true\nmin_machines_running = 0\n","language":"toml"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"4. Dockerfile"}]
11:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"FROM python:3.12-slim\n\nWORKDIR /app\nCOPY requirements.txt .\nRUN pip install -r requirements.txt\n\nCOPY . .\nEXPOSE 8080\n\nCMD [\"python\", \"-m\", \"mnemosyne.server\"]\n","language":"dockerfile"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"5. Deploy"}]
13:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"fly deploy\n","language":"bash"}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scaling"}]
